vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.6.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-453: Full vBRIEF v0.5 spec support — uid, author, sequence, references, timestamps

plan.title: Full vBRIEF v0.5 spec support — uid, author, sequence, references, timestamps
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: Panopticon uses ~40% of the vBRIEF v0.5 spec. Missing fields: uid, author (both levels), sequence, references, created/updated/completed timestamps, and priority on items. We want full spec compliance for the Deft team conversation and better audit trail.
narratives.Proposal: Implement all missing v0.5 fields across types, I/O, beads sync, planning prompt, and builder. Add artifact auto-copy and PRD discovery to the planning lifecycle. Build a rich VBriefViewer dashboard component. Update all documentation.

items.title: Update vBRIEF types with all v0.5 fields

narrative.Action: Add missing fields to VBriefDocument.vBRIEFInfo (author, description), VBriefPlan (uid, sequence, references, created, updated), VBriefItem (created, completed), VBriefSubItem (created, completed). Create new VBriefReference interface. All new fields are optional for backwards compatibility.

subItems.title: VBriefDocument.vBRIEFInfo has author?: string and description?: string fields
VBriefPlan has uid?, sequence?, references?, created?, updated? fields
VBriefItem and VBriefSubItem have created? and completed? fields
VBriefReference interface exists with uri (required), label?, type?

items.title: Add timestamps and sequence to I/O status update functions

narrative.Action: Modify updateItemStatus() and updateSubItemStatus() in io.ts to: (1) set vBRIEFInfo.updated and plan.updated to current ISO timestamp, (2) increment plan.sequence (default to 1 if missing), (3) set item.completed or subItem.completed when status transitions to 'completed'.

subItems.title: updateItemStatus sets vBRIEFInfo.updated and plan.updated on every call
updateItemStatus increments plan.sequence (starts at 1 if missing)
updateItemStatus sets item.completed when status → 'completed'
updateSubItemStatus sets subItem.completed when status → 'completed'
updateSubItemStatus increments plan.sequence and sets updated timestamps

items.title: Verify beads sync compatibility with new I/O timestamps

narrative.Action: syncBeadStatusToVBrief() already calls updateItemStatus() and updateSubItemStatus() — which now handle timestamps and sequence. Verify no regressions. The sequence counter will increment once per updateItemStatus call and once per each AC subItem update, which is correct (each is a distinct write).

subItems.title: syncBeadStatusToVBrief correctly propagates completed timestamps via io.ts calls
Sequence increments correctly when bead completion marks item + multiple AC subItems

items.title: Update PlanBuilder with new v0.5 fields

narrative.Action: Add builder methods: uid(), sequence(), references(), description(). Update build() to emit vBRIEFInfo.author (from package.json version) and vBRIEFInfo.description. Add plan.created and plan.updated in build(). Update addTask() to accept and set created timestamp.

subItems.title: PlanBuilder.build() emits vBRIEFInfo.author as 'panopticon-cli/<version>'
PlanBuilder has uid(), sequence(), references(), description() methods
build() sets plan.created and plan.updated to current timestamp

items.title: Update planning prompt with full v0.5 template and PRD discovery

narrative.Action: Modify buildPlanningPrompt() to accept planningModel parameter. Import package.json version. Update JSON template to include all new fields: vBRIEFInfo.author, description; plan.uid (instruct agent to generate UUID), plan.author (inject 'agent:<planningModel>'), plan.sequence: 1, plan.created/updated, plan.references, items[].priority, items[].created. Add PRD discovery: scan docs/prds/planned/ and docs/prds/active/ for issue-matching files, include paths in prompt and references template.

subItems.title: buildPlanningPrompt accepts planningModel parameter and injects as plan.author
JSON template includes vBRIEFInfo.author with package.json version
Template includes uid, sequence, created, updated, references, items[].priority, items[].created
PRD discovery scans docs/prds/ for issue-matching files and includes in references

items.title: Auto-copy planning artifacts to docs/prds/active/ on complete-planning

narrative.Action: In the complete-planning endpoint (issues.ts), after creating beads: copy .planning/STATE.md to docs/prds/active/<ISSUE-ID>-plan.md and .planning/plan.vbrief.json to docs/prds/active/<ISSUE-ID>-plan.vbrief.json. Skip if target files already exist. Use async fs operations (fs/promises), NOT sync. Ensure docs/prds/active/ directory exists before copying.

subItems.title: complete-planning copies STATE.md to docs/prds/active/<ISSUE>-plan.md
complete-planning copies plan.vbrief.json to docs/prds/active/<ISSUE>-plan.vbrief.json
Copy is skipped if target file already exists (no overwrite)
Uses async fs operations (fs/promises), not sync

items.title: Copy existing PRDs into workspace on start-planning

narrative.Action: In start-planning (spawn-planning-session.ts), before writing PLANNING_PROMPT.md: scan docs/prds/planned/ and docs/prds/active/ for .md files matching the issue ID. Copy matching PRDs to .planning/prd.md in the workspace so the planning agent has them locally. Pass discovered paths to buildPlanningPrompt() for the references template.

subItems.title: start-planning scans docs/prds/planned/ and docs/prds/active/ for issue-matching .md files
Matching PRD is copied to .planning/prd.md in the workspace
Works correctly when no PRD exists (no error, no copy)

items.title: Update documentation with vBRIEF v0.5 field reference

narrative.Action: Update docs/VBRIEF.md to document all new fields (uid, author, sequence, references, timestamps) with examples. Add vBRIEF section to CLAUDE.md with spec links (canonical deftai/vBRIEF, our extension proposal, our fork). Update README.md feature table to add vBRIEF, TLDR, Effect.js, and updated Beads rows.

subItems.title: docs/VBRIEF.md documents all new v0.5 fields with examples
CLAUDE.md has vBRIEF section referencing canonical deftai/vBRIEF spec
README.md feature table includes vBRIEF, TLDR, Effect.js, Beads rows

items.title: Test suite for vBRIEF v0.5 spec fields

narrative.Action: Create tests/vbrief/full-spec.test.ts covering: readPlan preserves uid/author/sequence/references, updateItemStatus increments sequence and sets timestamps, updateItemStatus sets completed timestamp when status → completed, updateSubItemStatus sets completed and increments sequence, syncBeadStatusToVBrief propagates timestamps correctly, planning prompt includes all new field placeholders, PRD discovery finds matching files.

subItems.title: readPlan preserves uid, author, sequence, references fields
updateItemStatus increments sequence and sets updated timestamps
updateItemStatus/updateSubItemStatus sets completed timestamp on status → completed
Planning prompt template includes uid, author, sequence, references, timestamps

narrative.Action: Create component suite in src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/vbrief/: VBriefViewer (main container with List/DAG/Raw JSON tabs), VBriefHeader (title, status badge, uid, author, created/updated timestamps), VBriefNarratives (markdown-rendered narrative sections), VBriefReferences (clickable link list), VBriefItemCard (expandable card with status/difficulty/priority badges, narrative, AC checklist, dependencies), VBriefItemList (renders list of item cards). Uses react-markdown for narrative rendering, existing PlanDAG for DAG tab, localStorage for view preference.

subItems.title: VBriefViewer renders with List/DAG/Raw JSON tab switching
VBriefHeader shows title, status badge, uid, author, created/updated timestamps
VBriefNarratives renders Problem/Proposal sections as markdown
VBriefItemCard shows difficulty/priority badges and AC checklist with status indicators
Handles missing plan gracefully (shows 'No plan available' message)

items.title: Integrate VBriefViewer into KanbanBoard and InspectorPanel

narrative.Action: Add 'vBRIEF' button to issue card actions in KanbanBoard.tsx (alongside existing 'Beads Tasks' button). Add vBRIEF tab to InspectorPanel.tsx. Both use GET /api/workspaces/:issueId/plan to fetch data. Viewer opens as a panel/dialog from both locations.

subItems.title: 'vBRIEF' button appears on kanban issue cards with plan data available
Clicking 'vBRIEF' button opens the VBriefViewer
InspectorPanel has vBRIEF tab that renders VBriefViewer

narrative.Action: Create tests/frontend/VBriefViewer.test.tsx using Vitest + React Testing Library. Test: header renders title/status/uid/author/timestamps, narratives render as markdown, references render as clickable links, items expand with AC checklist, completed AC shows checkmark, DAG tab renders PlanDAG, Raw JSON toggle shows formatted JSON, missing plan shows fallback message.

subItems.title: Header renders plan title, status badge, uid, author, timestamps
Item cards expand to show AC checklist with status indicators
List/DAG/Raw JSON tab switching works correctly
Missing plan shows graceful fallback message
